stories.title: Student signup and profile setup
stories.changes: Critical fix: dashboard section data display now correctly reads extracted data from both schema locations. readSectionAcademic(), readSectionTests(), and readSectionItems() in profile.js now handle both file.data.* (manual entry envelope) and top-level file.* fields written by profile-merge.js (document extraction). app.js card render guarded with escapeHtml(String(statusLabel)) to prevent [object Object] display.

notes: Patch release — single bug fix in profile.js and app.js. No breaking changes. No database migrations. No new dependencies.
